COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Continued To Nov-12-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff. There being no appearance by Defendants Lee Esther Barrow and Julius Banks, the Court orders the matter removed from the Settlement Conference Calendar and the request for jury trial stricken. Trial date is confirmed.
